name: Holiday Brunch Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter in a large bowl. Chop ham into small pieces and add to the melted butter.
3. Beat eggs until light-lemon-colored. Stir in flour and remaining ingredients (cottage cheese, baking powder, shredded Monterey Jack, chopped chilies, and sliced ham) until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a well-greased casserole dish.
5. Bake for 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
